summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Sistema de Agendamento de Salas de Reunião. Backend APIs and frontend functionality working excellently with corporate design implementation.
passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - All 12/12 API tests passed
Admin login with admin@sistema.com / admin123 credentials
Dashboard statistics display (5 salas, 0 reservas initially)
Rooms page showing 5 room cards (4 original + 1 test room)
Room booking creation modal and form submission
Calendar view with proper week display and room availability
Admin Users page access with Excel import/export functionality
Mobile responsive sidebar with hamburger menu
Route protection - redirects to login when not authenticated
Corporate design implementation with NexusMeet branding
JWT authentication and role-based access control
Room availability checking and booking system
User management with proper admin/user role display

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (only logout button detection issue in automation script, functionality works)
